task: Go to https://books.toscrape.com and report the exact title and price of the single most expensive book in the Philosophy category.

attempts.claimed_answer:
The most expensive book in the Philosophy category at https://books.toscrape.com is:

**Title:** The Death of Humanity: and the Case for Life
**Price:** £58.11

This was determined by filtering to the Philosophy category (11 results), comparing all book prices, and verifying the full title on the product page.
